case_title: LA, SUNG T. vs. HAJIAN, JEREMIAH ALVAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, SUNG T. AS TO DEFENDANT HAJIAN, JEREMIAH ALVAN DOES 1 TO 60, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-14-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-25-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, SUNG T.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-14-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR DEC-13-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-13-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-13-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-15-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-13-1996 TO JAN-27-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-27-1997, OFF CALENDAR
